source.note: Read-only crawl of the actual MES product detail tabs. Cookies are not persisted.

attributes.dataSource: SELECT PRODUCT_GROUP_NAME AS "value", PRODUCT_GROUP_NAME AS "label", DESCRIPTION AS "desc" FROM PRODUCT_GROUP WHERE PRODUCT_TYPE=#{productType} AND PRODUCTION_TYPE=#{productionType}
SELECT PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AS VALUE, PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AS LABEL FROM PROCESS_FLOW WHERE  PROCESS_FLOW_STATE != 'Invalid'  GROUP BY PROCESS_FLOW_NAME
SELECT  DISTINCT BOM.bom_name as value, BOM.bom_name as label, BOM.bom_name as description FROM BOM WHERE bom_state in ('Frozen','Active') ORDER BY BOM.bom_name

SELECT  BOM.bom_version as value, BOM.bom_version as label, BOM.bom_state as description FROM BOM WHERE BOM.bom_name = #{bomName} UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT  'AA' as value, 'AA' as lable, '' as description FROM BOM WHERE BOM.bom_name = #{bomName}
SELECT RETICLE_SET_NAME AS VALUE, RETICLE_SET_NAME AS LABEL, DESCRIPTION as "desc" FROM RETICLE_SET WHERE  RETICLE_SET_STATE != 'Invalid'
SELECT AREA_NAME AS VALUE, AREA_NAME AS LABEL, DESCRIPTION as "desc" FROM AREA WHERE AREA_TYPE2 = 'Bank' AND AREA_STATE != 'Invalid'
SELECT AREA_NAME AS VALUE, DESCRIPTION AS LABEL FROM AREA WHERE AREA_TYPE2 = 'Bank' AND AREA_STATE != 'Invalid'
SELECT OWNER_GROUP_NAME AS VALUE, OWNER_GROUP_NAME AS LABEL, DESCRIPTION "DESC" FROM OWNER_GROUP WHERE  OWNER_GROUP_STATE != 'Invalid'
SELECT 	BIN_NAME  AS "value", 	BIN_NAME AS "label", 	DESCRIPTION  AS "desc" FROM 	BIN_DEF bd
SELECT PROCESS_STAGE_NAME AS VALUE, PROCESS_STAGE_NAME AS LABEL, description  as "desc" FROM PROCESS_STAGE WHERE  PROCESS_STAGE_STATE != 'Invalid'

items.stepDesc: DT刻蚀氧化层后台阶测量

attributes.dataSource: SELECT DISTINCT PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME AS VALUE, PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME AS LABEL, DESCRIPTION as "DESC" FROM PROCESS_CAPABILITY WHERE PROCESS_CAPABILITY_STATE = 'Valid' ORDER BY LABEL
SELECT DISTINCT RECIPE_NAME AS VALUE, RECIPE_NAME AS LABEL, DESCRIPTION as "DESC" FROM RECIPE WHERE RECIPE_STATE = 'Valid' AND PROCESS_CAPABILITY_NAME = #{processCapabilityName} ORDER BY LABEL
SELECT DISTINCT RETICLE_GROUP_NAME AS "VALUE", RETICLE_GROUP_NAME AS "LABEL", DESCRIPTION as "DESC" FROM 	RETICLE_GROUP WHERE RETICLE_GROUP_STATE = 'Valid' ORDER BY "LABEL"
SELECT 	DISTINCT RETICLE_NAME AS "VALUE", 	RETICLE_NAME AS "LABEL" FROM 	RETICLE WHERE 	RETICLE_GROUP_NAME = #{reticleGroupName} ORDER BY 	"LABEL"

items.stepDesc: DT刻蚀氧化层后台阶测量

attributes.dataSource: SELECT PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AS VALUE, PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AS LABEL,(PROCESS_NAME || '.'|| PROCESS_VERSION) AS desc  FROM PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ WHERE PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_TYPE <> 'SubProcessFlow' AND PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{processFlowName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = #{processFlowVersion} AND IDX < CAST(#{idx} AS INTEGER) ORDER BY IDX

items.STEPDESC: DT刻蚀氧化层后台阶测量

attributes.dataSource: SELECT PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_NAME AS VALUE, PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_NAME AS LABEL FROM PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER WHERE PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{processFlowName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = #{processFlowVersion} AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = #{processFlowSeqName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_TYPE IN ('Rework','Branch')

SELECT TO_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME  AS VALUE, TO_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AS LABEL FROM PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER WHERE PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{processFlowName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = #{processFlowVersion} AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = #{processFlowSeqName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_NAME  = #{alterName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_TYPE IN ('Rework','Branch')

SELECT TO_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AS VALUE, TO_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AS LABEL FROM PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER WHERE PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{processFlowName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = #{processFlowVersion} AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = #{processFlowSeqName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_NAME = #{alterName} AND TO_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME =#{alterFlowName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_TYPE IN ('Rework','Branch')

SELECT PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AS VALUE, PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AS LABEL,PROCESS_STEP.DESCRIPTION AS "desc" FROM PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ LEFT JOIN PROCESS_STEP ON PROCESS_STEP.PROCESS_STEP_NAME=PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ.PROCESS_NAME AND ((PROCESS_STEP.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION=PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ.PROCESS_VERSION) OR (PROCESS_STEP.PROCESS_STEP_STATE='Active' AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ.PROCESS_VERSION='AA' )) WHERE PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{processFlowName}  AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = #{processFlowVersion} AND PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_NAME = #{alterName} and PARENT_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME  = #{processFlowSeqName} AND ALTER_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{alterFlowName} AND (ALTER_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = #{alterFlowVersion} or PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ.PROCESS_VERSION=#{alterFlowVersion}) ORDER BY IDX ASC
SELECT PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION  AS VALUE, PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AS LABEL FROM PROCESS_FLOW    WHERE  PROCESS_FLOW_NAME  = #{toProcessFlowName}

SELECT PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_NAME AS VALUE, PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_NAME AS LABEL FROM PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER WHERE PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{toProcessFlowName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = #{toProcessFlowVersion} AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = #{toProcessFlowSeqName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_TYPE IN ('Rework','Branch')

SELECT TO_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME  AS VALUE, TO_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME AS LABEL FROM PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER WHERE PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{processFlowName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = #{toProcessFlowVersion} AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = #{toProcessFlowSeqName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_NAME  = #{toAlterName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_TYPE IN ('Rework','Branch')

SELECT TO_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AS VALUE, TO_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION AS LABEL FROM PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER WHERE PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{processFlowName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = #{toProcessFlowVersion} AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME = #{toProcessFlowSeqName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_NAME = #{toAlterName} AND TO_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME =#{toAlterFlowName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_TYPE IN ('Rework','Branch')

SELECT PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AS VALUE, PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AS LABEL,PROCESS_STEP.DESCRIPTION AS "desc" FROM PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ LEFT JOIN PROCESS_STEP ON PROCESS_STEP.PROCESS_STEP_NAME=PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ.PROCESS_NAME AND ((PROCESS_STEP.PROCESS_STEP_VERSION=PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ.PROCESS_VERSION) OR (PROCESS_STEP.PROCESS_STEP_STATE='Active' AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ.PROCESS_VERSION='AA' )) WHERE PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{processFlowName}  AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = #{processFlowVersion} AND PROCESS_FLOW_ALTER_NAME = #{toAlterName} and PARENT_PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME  = #{toProcessFlowSeqName} AND ALTER_PROCESS_FLOW_NAME = #{toAlterFlowName} AND (ALTER_PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION = #{toAlterFlowVersion} or PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ.PROCESS_VERSION=#{toAlterFlowVersion}) ORDER BY IDX ASC
SELECT ALARM_ID as VALUE,DESCRIPTION  as LABEL FROM ALARM_MGT_DEF WHERE ALARM_TYPE='MES' AND ALARM_ID LIKE '%_QT%'
SELECT ALARM_ID as VALUE,DESCRIPTION  as LABEL FROM ALARM_MGT_DEF WHERE ALARM_TYPE='MES' AND ALARM_ID LIKE '%_QT%'

attributes.dataSource: SELECT REASON_CODE AS VALUE, REASON_CODE AS LABEL, REASON_CODE as "desc" FROM REASON_CODE

SELECT DISTINCT PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME as VALUE,PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME AS LABEL,IDX,'' AS "DESC" FROM PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ WHERE PROCESS_FLOW_NAME=#{processFlowName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_VERSION=#{processFlowVersion} AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_NAME != #{processFlowSeqName} AND PROCESS_FLOW_SEQ_TYPE = 'ProcessStep' order by IDX asc
